visual: Front leg bent with knee over the ankle, rear leg straight with foot angled outward, roughly 70% of weight on the front leg.
motion_description: From a wide stance with the left knee bent and weight primarily on the left leg, the left arm slowly extends outward to the side slightly below shoulder height. It then sweeps upward and traces a large, continuous circle over the head, descending across the front of the torso. As the left hand lowers toward the right hip, the upper body rotates slightly to the right while the lower body stance remains steady.
